persons.arguments_against: Compiled as single-initial ('Sydney' one token). But the entry is the well-attested Sir Sydney Olivier, governor of Jamaica from 1907; the Jamaica 1908 listing matches the assumed-government period. Surname uncommon. Caveat: mechanical single-initial flag only.
persons.would_overturn: A second same-surname person in the same colony and years holding the same office, or a printed death/birth date excluding these years.
